data.title: Write RED tests for review-sample-files.sh + .test-index wiring
data.description:
## testing_mode: RED

## TDD Requirement

Tests FAIL (RED) before Task 2 creates review-sample-files.sh.
Given: injected file list via GIT_DIFF_MOCK env var; When: review-sample-files.sh called; Then: exits 0 with 7 lines OR exits 1 with INSUFFICIENT_FILES.

## Files to Create

### tests/unit/scripts/test-review-sample-files.sh

7 behavioral tests using GIT_DIFF_MOCK (file list), BINARY_MOCK_<basename>=1 (binary detection), LINE_COUNT_MOCK_<basename>=N (line counts). No real git operations.

- test_sample_7_from_above_threshold: GIT_DIFF_MOCK=10 eligible files → exits 0, stdout has exactly 7 lines
- test_sample_exactly_7_threshold: GIT_DIFF_MOCK=7 eligible files → exits 0, stdout has 7 lines
- test_sample_below_threshold_exits_1: GIT_DIFF_MOCK=6 eligible files → exits 1, stdout contains INSUFFICIENT_FILES
- test_sample_excludes_test_index: GIT_DIFF_MOCK includes .test-index → .test-index absent from stdout
- test_sample_excludes_binary: GIT_DIFF_MOCK includes file with BINARY_MOCK_<basename>=1 → that file absent from stdout
- test_sample_directory_spread: GIT_DIFF_MOCK=10 files across 5 dirs (2/dir) → stdout includes files from ≥3 distinct dirs
- test_sample_highest_line_count_priority: GIT_DIFF_MOCK=10 files, 7 have LINE_COUNT_MOCK=100, 3 have LINE_COUNT_MOCK=5 → all 3 low-count files absent from stdout

### .test-index

Append new entry (do NOT create duplicate line):
plugins/dso/scripts/review-sample-files.sh: tests/unit/scripts/test-review-sample-files.sh [test_sample_below_threshold_exits_1] [test_sample_excludes_test_index]

NOTE: Sprint dispatches parallel tasks to separate worktrees (worktree.isolation_enabled=true). Each worktree has its own .test-index; harvest-worktree.sh merges them. No shared-state race with Task 3.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Tests run (some fail expected)
  Verify: bash tests/unit/scripts/test-review-sample-files.sh 2>&1 | tail -5
- [ ] Lint passes
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] Format passes
  Verify: ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] Test file has 7 functions
  Verify: grep -c '^test_sample_' tests/unit/scripts/test-review-sample-files.sh | grep -q '^7$' && echo PASS
- [ ] .test-index entry and RED markers present
  Verify: grep 'test_sample_below_threshold_exits_1' .test-index && echo PASS
- Pre-implementation gate (execution note, not a durable Verify): run bash tests/unit/scripts/test-review-sample-files.sh BEFORE committing Task 2 and confirm FAIL output
